reforms.description: The Swiss government implemented a program to encourage technological development and the conversion of industrial activities in regions facing difficulties, which included measures such as guarantees for investment credits and tax reliefs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The program aims to stimulate technological development and support industrial conversion, which can enhance productivity and innovation in struggling regions.
reforms.status_evidence: The program has been actively implemented since its inception.
reforms.importance_rationale: The program represents a significant policy change aimed at fostering technological development.
reforms.source_quote: Most of these measures were worked out in 1978 as part of a general programme to be implemented over the period 1979-1982.

reforms.description: The establishment of the Swiss Software School aimed to address the need for skilled manpower in the electronics sector, contributing to technological training and workforce development.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing training and education in technology, the initiative enhances the skill set of the workforce, which is essential for innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The school has been established and is operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative is significant in addressing workforce needs but does not represent a structural change.
reforms.source_quote: In the field of technological training in electronics, the establishment of the Swiss Software School has probably helped to satisfy some of the need for skilled manpower.

reforms.description: The Swiss Institute for Technical Information was founded to provide data-processing services to small and medium-sized enterprises, facilitating access to technological resources.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving access to technological resources for SMEs, the institute supports innovation and competitiveness in the market.
reforms.status_evidence: The institute has been operational since its founding.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the institute is significant for enhancing knowledge transfer but does not constitute a major reform.
reforms.source_quote: The founding of the Swiss Institute for Technical Information... has made it possible to make data-processing services available to certain small and medium-sized enterprises.
